case_title: BODE CONCRETE LLC VS. JOHN K. KONSTIN et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KONSTIN, JOHN K. AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE KONSTIN FAMILY TRUST MACKEN, GAVIN DBA MACKEN CONSTRUCTION DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-11-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-27-2010

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT; [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC SERVED FEB-12-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KONSTIN, JOHN K. AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE KONSTIN FAMILY TRUST
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-13-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC SERVED MAR-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MACKEN, GAVIN DBA MACKEN CONSTRUCTION

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF BODE CONCRETE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KONSTIN, JOHN K. AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE KONSTIN FAMILY TRUST MACKEN, GAVIN DBA MACKEN CONSTRUCTION
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-11-2010 CONTINUED TO AUG-13-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
